version_description: Original key is F. I wrote Capo5 play C. added Dm7/G and G7 before the chorus part. and simplified most of chords.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
I know this pain,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Why do you lock yourself up, these chains?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
No one can change your life except for you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Don't ever let anyone step all over you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Just open your heart, and your mind[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Dm7/G[/ch] [ch]G7[/ch]
It’s really fair to feel, this way inside?[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]G7[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Oh Some-day somebody's gonna make you wanna turn around say goodbye[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]G7[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
Till then baby are you gonna let him hold you down make you cry?[/tab]

Don't you know?
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
Don't you know,   things change?  Things go your way[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Dm7[/ch]
If you Hold-on for one more day[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Dm7[/ch]                        [ch]Dm7/G[/ch] [ch]G7[/ch]
Can you Hold-on for one more day - Things go your way[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
Hold-on for one more day[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
You could sustain[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Or are you comfortable with the pain?[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
You've got No one to blame for your unhappiness[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
(no, baby) You got yourself into your own-mess[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Let-in your worries pass you by[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]Dm7[/ch]   [ch]Dm7/G[/ch] [ch]G7[/ch]
Don't you think it's worth your time, to change your mind?[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]G7[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Oh Some-day somebody's gonna make you wanna turn around say goodbye[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]G7[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
Till then baby are you gonna let him hold you down make you cry?[/tab]

Don't you know?
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
Don't you know,   things change?  Things go your way[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Dm7[/ch]
If you Hold-on for one more day[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Dm7[/ch]                       [ch]Dm7/G[/ch] [ch]G7[/ch]
Can you Hold-on for one more day - Things go your way[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
Hold-on for one more day[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
I know that there is pain  (but you)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
Hold-on for one more day (and)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
Break free from the chains  (Yeah)[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
I know that there is pain (but you)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
Hold-on for one more day (and you)[/tab]
